name: contract-boundary-permission-bundle
description: Codex skill bundle for setting up and validating contract-boundary filesystem permissions in JS/TS workspaces.

interface.shortDescription: Set up graph-derived Codex permission profiles
interface.longDescription: Adds a Codex skill for applying contract-boundary permission automation to JS/TS workspaces. The bundle includes Stop hook sources and deterministic scripts for generated freshness and permission validation, while hook activation remains a workspace-level setup step.
defaultPrompt: Set up contract-boundary Codex permissions in this workspace
